name: @forgeax/app-learn-render-2-lighting-5-light-casters
description: learn-render LearnOpenGL section 2.5 light casters — combined directional + point + spot (flashlight) lighting on 10 flat-color cubes with first-person camera.

bench.reason: pixel-parity bench drives parity-forgeax vs parity-threejs; learn-render entries land as bench:pixel-parity placeholders only
